name: Charlie Munger
philosophy: Seek rare businesses with strong incentives, rational culture, and compounding advantages, while inverting on what can go wrong.
heuristics: look for incentives and culture advantages
risk_rules: Avoid businesses where one stupid assumption can wipe out the whole thesis.
portfolio_habits: Willing to pay up for exceptional economics

commentary_snapshots.summary: Emphasized that avoiding obvious stupidity matters more than constant activity.

holdings_snapshots.note: Known for concentrated exposure to high-quality compounders.

blind_spots: Can dismiss speculative optionality too quickly
